title: At least six killed in Kyiv as gunman opens fire and takes hostages
summary_full: The attacker, who took hostages inside a supermarket, was killed after a shoot-out with police, officials say.
summary_public: The attacker, who took hostages inside a supermarket, was killed after a shoot-out with police, officials say.

UA.evidence: At least six killed in Kyiv as gunman opens fire
